title: GreyGaps
description: GreyGaps | Grayscale textures for Golden Apples. Simple, effective, and built for simplicity.
body:
# **Greygaps**

 **Donate** [Here](https://ko-fi.com/teddz)
(it helps a **ton!**) 

## **Overview**
**Greygaps** is a **resource pack** for players who likes dark themes or just want to be **simple** 

## **Features**
- **Full 1.21.x Compatibility** (Always shows as **Green**)
- **Simple Texture** (Looks simple and **cool**)
- **Clean Aesthetic** (Consistent look across all 1.21 versions)

----------------------------------------

- **Free for personal use**

- **No redistribution**

----------------------------------------
